reproducibility: real repositories at pinned SHAs; line-precise; pin-or-drop

seed.sink: Flask redirects to the request next parameter after login without an origin check
seed.patched_shape: the exact next_url is redirected only in a branch dominated by is_safe_redirect_url

heldout.sink: a Django redirect consumes the next query parameter directly
heldout.patched_shape: unsafe redirect calls are replaced with the same-origin safe_redirect wrapper

heldout.sink: Django redirects to a request parameter after only a startswith slash check
heldout.patched_shape: url_has_allowed_host_and_scheme validates a saved redirect_url before every redirect

heldout.sink: Tornado redirects a request URI after trimming only trailing slashes, preserving a protocol-relative authority
heldout.patched_shape: the path receives exactly one leading slash before the query suffix is reattached

heldout.drop_reason: authoritative CWE-601, but the fix changes library-internal redirect bookkeeping rather than an application redirect sink; a user-code rule cannot discriminate it
